title: A day camp counsellor needs a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## You need a work permit
If you’re a day camp counsellor, you need a work permit to work in Canada.
At a day camp , campers go home each day.
You’re a camp counsellor if your main duties include supervising and guiding children in summer camp activities, and leading sports, crafts, games and other recreational activities.
You can apply for an employer-specific work permit (opens in a new tab) . Your employer needs to get a positive labour market impact assessment (LMIA) to hire you.
You must meet the general eligibility requirements (opens in a new tab) for a work permit.
Your employer must give you both of the following:
- a copy of the positive LMIA
- your job offer letter or contract
How to apply for a work permit

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
